name: sdlc-artifact-factory
description: A Claude Code plugin that drives any product through its full SDLC lifecycle — Strategy → Ideate → Design → Implement → Data → Quality → Deploy → Customer Validation — producing real, reviewable, methodology-compliant artifacts at every phase.
_components_note: This map is documentation for humans — Claude Code auto-discovers skills/, agents/, commands/*.md, and hooks/hooks.json by convention and does not read this key.
_agent_roster_note: Human-readable roster only — not a manifest key Claude Code reads. agents/*/AGENT.md is auto-discovered.

methodology.enforcement: blocking — absence in an applicable artifact is a defect

_settings_file_note: This repo's own dev settings live in settings.json, auto-applied — not a manifest key Claude Code reads.
